text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
School is almost over for the day. As I'm passing
the dance studio, I hear...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
One, two. One, two... And now for the final
pose—whoa, whoaaaa!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Ugh. I seriously just can't get that last step
right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The teacher asked me to come check in on you...
You're still here, Teio?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You better hurry up or else your training
tomorrow is going to be affected.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But McQueen, you saw it too, right? How our
dance teacher was praising the girl next to me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It's sooo frustrating!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What's the point of winning races if the person
next to me onstage is more eye-catching than I
am?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Well, school's almost over, so let's go home.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I was told to make you go home by any means
necessary.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna! There's no way you can make me! I
don't care if school's almost over!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Stop acting like a child. I feel embarrassed for
you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Don't look at me like that! Now hurry up and—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But I really want to win at everything!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Oh, fine! I give up! You're so stubborn, do you
know that?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
When I say time's up, you better stop. Do you
hear me?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Really?! Hooray!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Okay, then you dance too! ♪ It's no fun if you
just stand there and watch.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What makes you think I would join you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I said I would watch, but joining your lesson is out
of the question!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Okay, get ready! I'm hitting play!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hey! What did I just—ugh, really now?!
